Indovyapar

Admin

Website delivery areas

These PINs apply to the entire marketplace. When “Limit to listed PINs” is on, shoppers only see products if their PIN is on this list (vendors cannot override this).

Delivery coverage

Turn off "Limit to listed PINs" to offer pan-India delivery. Turn it on to use only the PINs listed below (no PINs in the list while limited still behaves as all-India until you add some).

All-India mode is on — turn on “Limit to listed PINs” above to add or manage PIN codes.

Add one PIN

Add many PINs

Paste a list separated by commas, new lines, or spaces (6-digit codes only). Duplicates and PINs already on the list are skipped automatically.
